classes.purpose: Find and interpret prior studio documents within an explicit archive scope
classes.content: User questions; the configured absolute archive-root path; scope names; relative document paths; search snippets; opened source passages; file, page, paragraph, sheet-row, message-line, or text-line locators; source hashes; extraction limitations; and Vera's source-backed synthesis

security_controls.control: Each professional keeps configuration and the derived SQLite index in an owner-only local state directory outside the source archive; the workflow does not provide index sharing.

Search requires an exact configured top-level scope, symbolic links are skipped or rejected, relative paths are normalized, source and state roots cannot contain one another, and bounded discovery rejects unsafe scale.
Each searchable chunk is bound to the source SHA-256, relative path, and locator; opening a citation re-hashes the current source and fails closed after byte changes.
OCR is optional, uses Vera's local adapter with model downloads disabled, and reports unavailable weights or partial extraction rather than using an external OCR route.
